//: The cross-rail credit-limit flagship (PRD §11): ONE $5 authority spanning a Stripe TEST-MODE rail AND an x402/USDC base-sepolia TESTNET rail. The combined cross-rail spend is capped at $5; the next call on EITHER rail past the combined cap is refused usage-cap-exceeded before the rail is touched. The Stripe rail (stripe-adapter) is BUILT (AGENT-PAY-1 GREEN); the x402 rail is the next adapter (AGENT-PAY-2). The rails are WRAPPED downstream MCP servers; auths-mcp-core holds zero payment code.

stripe.//: Stripe TEST-MODE charge rail. Adapter: adapters/stripe-adapter (BUILT) — wraps Stripe's Charge API and returns the Charge object the gateway extracts amount_captured (cents) from. Hermetic with no key (recorded fixture shape); a real sk_test_… in the custody vault makes it call Stripe-test for real. LIVE: STRIPE_API_KEY (sk_test_…) in the gateway's custody vault, never the agent. (@stripe/mcp --tools=all is the stock alternative downstream.)

x402.//: x402 / USDC base-sepolia TESTNET rail. Adapter: adapters/x402-adapter (extracts SettlementResponse / PaymentRequirements.maxAmountRequired, atomic USDC 6 decimals → cents). LIVE: needs a FUNDED USDC TESTNET WALLET (base-sepolia) + an x402 facilitator URL — OUT OF HERMETIC SCOPE, deferred evidence.

expect_refusal.//: the call that would reserve PAST $5 across rails is refused before the rail is touched, even when the per-rail silo reads in-budget (the moat)
